title: coryphopteris hubrechtensis
intro: Coryphopteris hubrechtensis, also known as Java club fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyatheaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Coryphopteris hubrechtensis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed for their medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
